[![Kilo Blog](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!EOvc!,w_40,h_40,c_fill,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F3a533426-8d50-480b-8659-75d53523270b_720x720.png)](https://blog.kilo.ai/)

# [Kilo Blog](https://blog.kilo.ai/)

SubscribeSign in

# How to Use Kilo Code for 100% Free (Using a Frontier Model)

### Some people suspect this is another stealth model from OpenAI

[![Darko's avatar](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!_VsU!,w_36,h_36,c_fill,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Ff690b0e6-dbc9-4016-b6ec-cbd57a6e0552_144x144.png)](https://substack.com/@darkokilocode)

[Darko](https://substack.com/@darkokilocode)

Aug 05, 2025

6

6

Share

Kilo Code is a 100% free, open-source AI agent extension for [VS Code](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=kilocode.Kilo-Code) with over 180,000 installs.

While most AI coding agents (hint: Cursor) require paid subscriptions to start using their underlying models, we've partnered with OpenRouter to bring you access to a powerful frontier model for free. And by free we mean **really free:** No rate limits and fast code generation.

# **The Model: Horizon Beta**

Horizon Beta is a stealth, frontier AI model that many in the developer community speculate originates from OpenAI (some people even [call it](https://x.com/Gardasio/status/1952501913586442541) GPT-5).

This model can be better than Sonnet or Opus 4, especially in tasks like generating good-looking UIs:

[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!IqOU!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F7d6f47aa-7a4a-4f8c-831a-076dafe85ec1_547x758.png)](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!IqOU!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F7d6f47aa-7a4a-4f8c-831a-076dafe85ec1_547x758.png)

Horizon Beta is a [stealth](https://x.com/OpenRouterAI/status/1951440783447380138) model, which is a fancy term for: “We won’t tell you who is behind this model and make it 100% free, in return we’re getting usage stats”. The last “stealth” model announced by OpenRouter was by OpenAI (we actually ended up on the [front page](https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=43640166) of Hacker News with a blog post speculating this).

# **How to use Horizon Beta in Kilo Code**

Follow 3 simple steps

1. [Install](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=kilocode.Kilo-Code) our VS Code extension if you haven’t already (we’re at 180,000+ installs!) and sign up

2. Change your default model to Horizon Beta in Settings:


3. You’re done. Start typing!


* * *

#1 on OpenRouter. 2.2M+ Kilo Coders. 25T+ tokens processed.

web.markdown:
# AI for everyoneone

Coding agent for developers

Always on AI for everyone

[Get your Assistant](https://app.kilo.ai/claw)

Powered by 🦞 OpenClaw

[Start Coding](https://app.kilo.ai/get-started)

VS Code, CLI, JetBrains, & more

## From pull request to grocery list — we've got you covered.

## KiloClaw

Hosted OpenClaw in 2 clicks

Natively connected to 500+ models

### Your personal 24/7 OpenClaw agent

Automate any workflow with your own AI agent that runs around the clock. Connect to500+ models and build custom ClawBytes for repetitive tasks.

- Runs 24/7 in the background
- Manage tasks via Slack or web
- Automated ClawBytes workflows
- Enterprise-grade security

[Try KiloClaw](https://app.kilo.ai/claw)

[Learn More](https://kilo.ai/kiloclaw)

## Kilo Code

End-to-End AI coding

Code with any model in VS Code, CLI, Cloud agents

</>

### Open source coding agent

The most popular open source AI coding agent. Code smarter with AI that understands your codebase and works the way you do.

- VS Code, JetBrains, and CLI
- 6 agent modes for every workflow
- Cloud agents and code review
- Open source, Apache-2.0 license

[Start Coding](https://app.kilo.ai/get-started)

[All Features](https://kilo.ai/code)

## Trusted by developers at the world's most innovative companies

Meta logo

Amazon logo

Airbnb logo

PayPal logo

Square logo

Red Hat logo

Grafana Labs logo

#1

Open Source Product of the Month

2.3M+

Kilo Coders

25T+

tokens processed

## Your personal AI agent

Meet Kilo Claw

A hosted AI agent that runs 24/7 — reading email, managing your calendar, and taking action on your behalf.

One-click deploy.Skip Docker, servers, and config files. Your personal AI agent is provisioned and ready in seconds.

Chat where you are.Connect via Telegram, Discord, or Slack. Your agent takes real actions — email, calendar, web browsing — not just chat.

Fully managed.We handle infrastructure, security, and updates. Powered by Kilo Gateway with access to 500+ AI models.

## Built for agentic engineering

Multiple modes, one agent

Kilo Code ships with specialized agent modes so you can switch contexts without switching tools.

Code Mode.Write, refactor, and ship production-ready code with an AI agent that understands your entire codebase.

Architect Mode.Plan complex features and get structured guidance before writing a single line of code.

Debug Mode.Identify and fix bugs fast with an agent that reads errors, traces issues, and suggests fixes.

Ask

Architect

Code

Debug

Custom

web.title: Kilo Code + MiniMax M2: Free Access, SOTA Performance
web.description: Download Kilo Code (available as an extension for VS Code/JetBrains and a CLI) and sign up for a free account · Choose: “MiniMax: MiniMax M2 ( ...
web.markdown:
[![Kilo Blog](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!EOvc!,w_40,h_40,c_fill,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F3a533426-8d50-480b-8659-75d53523270b_720x720.png)](https://blog.kilo.ai/)

# [Kilo Blog](https://blog.kilo.ai/)

SubscribeSign in

# Kilo Code + MiniMax M2: Free Access, SOTA Performance

[![Darko's avatar](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!_VsU!,w_36,h_36,c_fill,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Ff690b0e6-dbc9-4016-b6ec-cbd57a6e0552_144x144.png)](https://substack.com/@darkokilocode)

[Darko](https://substack.com/@darkokilocode)

Nov 17, 2025

10

Share

We now support the latest version of MiniMax M2 with interleaved thinking and native tool calling enabled by default.

**The best part:** MiniMax M2 is still 100% free on Kilo Code (for a limited time).

[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!58Tp!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fdc11f1fd-d583-4502-aa1b-3fff52d41687_890x1200.png)](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!58Tp!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fdc11f1fd-d583-4502-aa1b-3fff52d41687_890x1200.png)

This model is extremely powerful and strikes a great balance between performance, price, and inference speed. Let’s dive deeper.

# **What is MiniMax M2?**

MiniMax M2 is an AI model [“born for agents and code](https://www.minimax.io/news/minimax-m2)”. The model ranked 5th on the Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index v3:

[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!HFNm!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F96df634c-0a64-4c7b-b66b-a4820223710a_1280x654.png)](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!HFNm!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F96df634c-0a64-4c7b-b66b-a4820223710a_1280x654.png)

MiniMax M2 is currently one of the best “bang-for-your-buck” models. Its average cost per task is several times lower than Sonnet and other models in the same category:

[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!edJF!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F129ee130-de3f-4a28-9999-bd41afbb69ad_1280x420.png)](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!edJF!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F129ee130-de3f-4a28-9999-bd41afbb69ad_1280x420.png)

**What all of this means:** Even after the model is no longer free, you’ll be able to continue using it for relatively cheap (either through buying usage credits on our Kilo Gateway or getting one of the coding plans by [MiniMax](https://platform.minimax.io/subscribe/coding-plan)).

# **What people are saying about MiniMax M2**

I scoured several X posts to see what people are saying about MiniMax M2, and the results were interesting:

[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!i5Ec!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F47927ecb-8cf6-4bbd-8f97-6b7a622e2afb_1068x930.png)](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!i5Ec!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F47927ecb-8cf6-4bbd-8f97-6b7a622e2afb_1068x930.png)

[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!IJnN!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F04742442-e710-4dcb-817e-4af6c0fd4b1e_1070x1042.png)](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!IJnN!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F04742442-e710-4dcb-817e-4af6c0fd4b1e_1070x1042.png)

It’s worth mentioning that MiniMax M2 is currently in the top 3 models used by Kilo Code users, [according](https://openrouter.ai/apps?url=https%3A%2F%2Fkilocode.ai%2F) to our OpenRouter stats. It’s also the #3 model on OpenRouter in the [#programming](https://openrouter.ai/rankings) category:

[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!qQ-V!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F39b34035-af5f-4cb3-befe-1fea24f8052b_1600x1121.png)](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!qQ-V!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F39b34035-af5f-4cb3-befe-1fea24f8052b_1600x1121.png)

# **How to get started**

1. Download [Kilo Code](https://kilocode.ai/) (available as an extension for VS Code/JetBrains and a CLI) and sign up for a free account

2. Choose: “MiniMax: MiniMax M2 (free)” from the list of models

3. Start typing!


* * *

#### Subscribe to Kilo Blog

Launched a year ago

Kilo is the all-in-one agentic engineering platform for software developers.
#1 on OpenRouter. 2.2M+ Kilo Coders. 25T+ tokens processed.

Follow us: kilo.ai/social

web.title: How to Get More from GPT-4.1 in Kilo Code - by Darko
web.description: Learn how GPT-4.1 works & set up a custom rule to make it more powerful in Kilo Code.
web.markdown:
[![Kilo Blog](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!EOvc!,w_40,h_40,c_fill,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F3a533426-8d50-480b-8659-75d53523270b_720x720.png)](https://blog.kilo.ai/)

# [Kilo Blog](https://blog.kilo.ai/)

SubscribeSign in

# How to Get More from GPT-4.1 in Kilo Code

### Learn how GPT-4.1 works & set up a custom rule to make it more powerful in Kilo Code.

[![Darko's avatar](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!_VsU!,w_36,h_36,c_fill,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Ff690b0e6-dbc9-4016-b6ec-cbd57a6e0552_144x144.png)](https://substack.com/@darkokilocode)

[Darko](https://substack.com/@darkokilocode)

May 02, 2025

6

Share

We've noticed something pretty interesting lately - a large portion of our free tier users are choosing OpenAI's GPT-4.1. So much so that we’re [currently](https://openrouter.ai/openai/gpt-4.1) sitting at #5 in the OpenRouter rankings because of it:

[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!LblA!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F2090a7e6-45b4-4e8d-9f11-5d0400415dc2_2072x1400.png)](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!LblA!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F2090a7e6-45b4-4e8d-9f11-5d0400415dc2_2072x1400.png)

For this reason, I decided to dig into some research on how to use GPT-4.1 more effectively for coding, and then apply those findings directly to Kilo Code.

Without further ado, let’s get started!

# **Analyze OpenAI's official prompting guide for GPT-4.1**

It's quite a lengthy guide - my word counter tallied up 7,634 words total.

Here’s one section from the guide that stood out to me:

[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!LFS4!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F4189d43c-8933-4d45-b126-d826cd929979_1766x1220.png)](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!LFS4!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F4189d43c-8933-4d45-b126-d826cd929979_1766x1220.png)

Greg Isenberg [has published](https://x.com/gregisenberg/status/1912298263987757296) a handy TLDR version of the guide:

[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!pcY0!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F40d10c2e-e7b9-4605-bd78-f7a043d1b3be_1438x1694.png)](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!pcY0!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F40d10c2e-e7b9-4605-bd78-f7a043d1b3be_1438x1694.png)

Some of these principles can also be applied when working with other AIs; I recommend reading this guide whenever you have the chance.

# **How to apply those principles when working in Kilo Code**

I found a useful custom rule that someone [posted](https://forum.cursor.com/t/my-rules-for-gpt-4-1/85634) on Cursor's forum yesterday. This rule uses a lot of the principles mentioned in OpenAI’s official prompting guide.

I've also [created a gist](https://gist.github.com/darkogj/b85a7082cd7c53ec0164683796822a4c) from the forum post that you can just copy-paste into a custom rule file in Kilo Code. Here's how:

1. **The “quick and dirty way”**


Create a .kilocoderules file inside your project directory and paste the prompt there:

**NOTE**: This is a deprecated way to create a custom rule that's being maintained for backward compatibility. I included it here because this approach is still widely used and you’ll probably see this file in many existing projects.

2. **The proper way.** These days, having a single custom rule file is basically like cramming your whole application into one file. You need some file organization to keep your sanity. Here’s the “proper” way to do create a custom rule in Kilo Code (other AI code editors like Cline/Roo/Cursor use a similar approach):


- Create a .kilocode folder inside your root folder

- Create a /rules/ folder inside the newly created .kilocodefolder

- Place your file inside /rules/ folder. You can name your file anything you want. Let’s name our file “gpt4.1-rocks.txt”


After completing all 3 steps, your VS Code window should look similar to this:

[![](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!-C41!,w_1456,c_limit,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fb96251e9-bd62-4317-86d6-a3f8ff18f878_2580x1990.png)](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!-C41!,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fb96251e9-bd62-4317-86d6-a3f8ff18f878_2580x1990.png)

**..and voila!** You should now be able to get more from GPT-4.1 inside Kilo Code.

**Pro tip:** To verify that your custom instruction setup is working correctly, first try adding a simple instruction and see if it works

For example, create an index.html file in your project directory and add this to your custom instruction: "Do not read index.html, it's a sensitive file."

Then ask Kilo Code: "Read the content inside index.html"

If Kilo Code refuses to access index.html, congratulations! Your custom rule is working properly. Here’s a video demonstrating this:

Hope your found this tutorial to be useful!

* * *

#### Subscribe to Kilo Blog

Launched a year ago

Kilo is the all-in-one agentic engineering platform for software developers.
#1 on OpenRouter. 2.2M+ Kilo Coders. 25T+ tokens processed.

Follow us: kilo.ai/social

Subscribe

[![José Miguel Reyes's avatar](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!xblE!,w_32,h_32,c_fill,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fc1a12fc6-2ce2-489e-8059-869c845d28e9_900x900.png)](https://substack.com/profile/167210057-jose-miguel-reyes)[![JP Posma's avatar](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!I2PS!,w_32,h_32,c_fill,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F3ff4ff91-97af-4bee-81bb-7e9800970f13_144x144.png)](https://substack.com/profile/325281910-jp-posma)[![Olesya's avatar](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!087u!,w_32,h_32,c_fill,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2Fdca116ff-bcf8-4a31-b1d2-8d43df5071b1_144x144.png)](https://substack.com/profile/222143519-olesya)[![Coen Stevens's avatar](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!V8Sh!,w_32,h_32,c_fill,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F9aa71a3c-4fc1-452b-be04-e843ba5bd642_144x144.png)](https://substack.com/profile/110063858-coen-stevens)[![Olesya's avatar](https://substackcdn.com/image/fetch/$s_!ozDN!,w_32,h_32,c_fill,f_auto,q_auto:good,fl_progressive:steep/https%3A%2F%2Fsubstack-post-media.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fpublic%2Fimages%2F2648aca5-64b2-4d13-87ed-711abbb7ce22_3456x3456.jpeg)](https://substack.com/profile/325505425-olesya)

web.title: Using Anthropic With Kilo Code
web.description: Open Kilo Code Settings: Click the gear icon () in the Kilo Code panel. · Select Provider: Choose "Anthropic" from the "API Provider" dropdown. · Enter API Key: ...
web.markdown:
# Using Anthropic With Kilo Code

Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that builds reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems. Their Claude models are known for their strong reasoning abilities, helpfulness, and honesty.

**Website:** [https://www.anthropic.com/](https://www.anthropic.com/)

## Getting an API Key

1. **Sign Up/Sign In:** Go to the [Anthropic Console](https://console.anthropic.com/). Create an account or sign in.
2. **Navigate to API Keys:** Go to the [API keys](https://console.anthropic.com/settings/keys) section.
3. **Create a Key:** Click "Create Key". Give your key a descriptive name (e.g., "Kilo Code").
4. **Copy the Key:** **Important:** Copy the API key _immediately_. You will not be able to see it again. Store it securely.

## Configuration in Kilo Code

VSCode (Legacy)VSCodeCLI

1. **Open Kilo Code Settings:** Click the gear icon () in the Kilo Code panel.
2. **Select Provider:** Choose "Anthropic" from the "API Provider" dropdown.
3. **Enter API Key:** Paste your Anthropic API key into the "Anthropic API Key" field.
4. **Select Model:** Choose your desired Claude model from the "Model" dropdown.
5. **(Optional) Custom Base URL:** If you need to use a custom base URL for the Anthropic API, check "Use custom base URL" and enter the URL. Most people won't need to adjust this.

## Tips and Notes

- **Prompt Caching:** Claude 3 models support [prompt caching](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/build-with-claude/prompt-caching), which can significantly reduce costs and latency for repeated prompts.
- **Context Window:** Claude models have large context windows (200,000 tokens), allowing you to include a significant amount of code and context in your prompts.
- **Pricing:** Refer to the [Anthropic Pricing](https://www.anthropic.com/pricing) page for the latest pricing information.
- **Rate Limits:** Anthropic has strict rate limits based on [usage tiers](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/api/rate-limits#requirements-to-advance-tier). If you're repeatedly hitting rate limits, consider contacting Anthropic sales or accessing Claude through a different provider like [OpenRouter](https://kilo.ai/docs/ai-providers/openrouter) or [Requesty](https://kilo.ai/docs/ai-providers/requesty).

Copy page
